violations.description: FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Rice noted not being held at 140 degrees fahrenheit or above. Discarded at this time.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Microwave interior noted not in good repair uncleanable. Shelving inside True reachin cooler noted not in good repair. Cutting boards noted not in good repair.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being on floor inside walkin freezer.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service containers noted on floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceilings in kitchen food storage areas and front bar noted in need of cleaning and repair.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage containers noted not covered with tight fitting lids. ( Lids are up )
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Pop gun drain noted not clean in front bar. Walkkin cooler shelving noted in need of routine cleaning.
FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Rice noted not being held at 140 degrees fahrenheit near front bar. (104)
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in front grill area noted being used for other than hand washing discontinue storing water bottles and lids in sink.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained needs routine cleaning. Pop gun drains behind bar need routine cleaning.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloth buckets noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): White cutting boards noted not in good repair. Wire-type shelving inside 'True' reachin refrigerator noted not in good repair.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Lower metal shelving to store pots and pans noted not in good repair rusting. Some wire-type shelving inside walkin cooller noted not in good repair rusting.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceilings in kitchen area noted in need of cleaning and repair work.
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Leaking faucet noted at front grill area handsink needs repair. (losing excessive amount of water)
